name: yaml
description: A native Zig library for reading and writing YAML 1.2.2

releases.body:
## What's Changed
* Refactor internal YAML architecture by @ncode in https://github.com/ncode/yaml/pull/13


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/ncode/yaml/compare/0.1.0...0.2.0

## What's Changed
* It's born by @ncode in https://github.com/ncode/yaml/pull/1
* preallocate scanner tokens by @ncode in https://github.com/ncode/yaml/pull/2
* working to improve memory usage by @ncode in https://github.com/ncode/yaml/pull/3
* improve memory usage for simple load paths by @ncode in https://github.com/ncode/yaml/pull/4
* extend simple load fast path coverage by @ncode in https://github.com/ncode/yaml/pull/5
* reduce flow parser event allocations by @ncode in https://github.com/ncode/yaml/pull/6
* add source-line load fast path by @ncode in https://github.com/ncode/yaml/pull/7
* feat(benchmark): include token and event counts in allocation reports by @ncode in https://github.com/ncode/yaml/pull/8
* fix ci pipeline by using llvm plumbing by @ncode in https://github.com/ncode/yaml/pull/9
* reduce stream load composition memory by @ncode in https://github.com/ncode/yaml/pull/10
* update README.md by @ncode in https://github.com/ncode/yaml/pull/11
* ci: upload kcov coverage to Codecov and add badge by @ncode in https://github.com/ncode/yaml/pull/12

## New Contributors
* @ncode made their first contribution in https://github.com/ncode/yaml/pull/1

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/ncode/yaml/commits/0.1.0
